response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-platform experience aligned with the role’s technical demands, but his German proficiency is only basic (not C1), and there is minimal evidence of executive leadership, architectural oversight of multiple client projects, or formal project management experience — critical for this senior leadership role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across Linux, Python-adjacent (Node.js, DLang), and cloud-native tech
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and knowledge sharing across teams
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic', falling far short of required C1
Lacks explicit experience in client-facing architectural advisory or IT consulting leadership
No clear evidence of managing teams or leading project portfolios at an executive level
